q: How do I start the engine on the F-16C using the JFS?
expected: Engine start uses the Jet Fuel Starter (JFS). Set JFS to START2, advance throttle to IDLE around 20-25% RPM, monitor FTIT and oil pressure as the engine spools up to idle.

q: How do I align the INS before flight?
expected: Set the INS knob to ALIGN NORM and wait for a full alignment (typically ~8 minutes); the DED shows the alignment status/quality before switching to NAV.

q: What is the maximum G limit of the F-16C?
expected: Around 9 G; the FLCS limits the airframe, with lower limits at heavy gross weight / with stores.

q: At what speed should I take off / rotate?
expected: Takeoff at approx. 173 kts; begin rotation roughly 10 kts below takeoff speed (around 160-163 kts).

q: What does the Master Caution light mean and how do I reset it?
expected: It signals a caution; check the caution panel for the specific warning, then press the Master Caution button to reset the light.

q: How do I switch the radar between RWS and TWS modes?
expected: Use the OSB next to the radar mode label on the FCR page to cycle the air-to-air mode between RWS and TWS.

q: How do I lock (bug) a target in BVR using the radar?
expected: Slew the cursor over the contact and TMS forward (up) to bug/lock the target into a single-target-track; TMS aft to drop the lock.

q: How do I employ a JDAM (GBU-38) against a ground target?
expected: Select the JDAM on the SMS, set the target steerpoint/coordinates, ensure the weapon is in range (HUD/launch cues), and release with the pickle button when within the release envelope.

q: What is the correct procedure to fire an AIM-120 AMRAAM?
expected: Select A-A mode and the AIM-120, lock the target, confirm it is within the launch zone (DLZ cues on HUD), and fire with the weapon-release/pickle.

q: How do I set up and employ the AGM-88 HARM?
expected: Select the HARM on the SMS, choose the employment mode (e.g., POS/HAS), have it detect/handoff the radar emitter threat, then release within parameters.

q: How do I employ the AGM-65 Maverick?
expected: Select the Maverick, uncage/slave the seeker to the target (via TGP or boresight), get a lock on the target, then fire with the pickle button.

q: How do I perform an ILS landing in the F-16C?
expected: Tune the ILS frequency, set the instrument mode, follow the localizer and glideslope cues on the HUD/ADI down to the runway.

q: How do I start the engines on the F/A-18C Hornet?
expected: Different aircraft not covered by this guide. The assistant should state the answer is not in the F-16 guide and not make it up.

q: What is the real-world combat radius of the F-16 in kilometers?
expected: Real-world performance figure, not a DCS procedure from this guide. The assistant should say it is not in the guide.

q: How do I activate the IRST (infrared search and track) sensor on the F-16C?
expected: The DCS F-16C does not have an IRST; the guide does not cover it. The assistant should say the answer is not in the guide rather than inventing a procedure.
